engine.description: Built-in agent; use WM_AGENT_CMD for other CLIs. The historical copilot name is deprecated (see v2.md).

on.description: Trigger OR-block (issues, issue_comment, pull_request, pull_request_review_comment, slash_command, schedule, workflow_dispatch). slash_command may include events: [issue_comment, pull_request_review_comment].

safe-outputs.description: Declare allowed output kinds and optional messages (create-pull-request, add-comment, create-pull-request-review-comment, submit-pull-request-review, messages.run-started, …).
